seoTitle: Nyora vs O'Connell — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Nyora and O'Connell. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Nyora and O'Connell.
heading: Nyora vs O'Connell — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Nyora, New South Wales and O'Connell, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Nyora has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to O'Connell (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Nyora or O'Connell safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Nyora has a flood risk score of 31/100, while O'Connell scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Nyora scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. O'Connell scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Nyora or O'Connell?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Nyora has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
